title: Senior Doctor - Solara Active Pharma - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Solara Active Pharma - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Solara Active Pharma in Bhopal offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Solara Active Pharma:
Solara Active Pharma is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Solara Active Pharma!
